basic_details.job_title: IUAC Recruitment 2026: Apply Online for Scientist-C, Junior Engineer-C & Library Assistant-C Posts
basic_details.short_information: IUAC Recruitment 2026 notification has been released by the Inter-University Accelerator Centre (IUAC), New Delhi, an Autonomous Body of the University Grants Commission (UGC) under the Ministry of Education, Government of India, inviting applications from qualified Indian Nationals for Direct Recruitment to 8 posts of Scientist-C, Junior Engineer-C, and Library Assistant-C. Eligible candidates can apply online at www.iuac.res.in/vacancies before the last date of 4 August 2026, up to 23:59 Hrs.

application_fee.details: The application fee is non-refundable and must be paid through online mode. Candidates are advised to check their eligibility before submitting the application form or fee payment.

age_limit.details: Scientist-C: 26 years Junior Engineer-C: 30 years Library Assistant-C: 34 years | Eligibility, including age, is considered as on the last date of receipt of application. | No age relaxation is available to persons working on Contract/Ad-hoc/Daily Wage/Work Charged basis.

qualification.details: Scientist-C: M.Sc. (Physics/Applied Physics) with a consistently good academic record (Class-X onwards with at least 60%) from a recognized University/Institute. Candidates completing their M.Sc. in academic year 2025-26 can also apply, provided the final degree is available at the time of interview. Desirable: proficiency in the use of a variety of computer applications. Junior Engineer-C: Diploma (Electronics) from a recognized university/institute with a consistently good academic record (Class-X onwards with minimum 60% marks). Desirable: 3 years' experience in the relevant field with an R&D institution, and proficiency in computer applications. The diploma/degree must be cleared on or before the last date of application submission. Library Assistant-C: B.Lib. with B.Sc. and 4 years' experience in the operation of a computerized library. Desirable: knowledge of computer applications. | Scientist-C: Written Test and Interview Junior Engineer-C: Written Test and Skill/Trade Test Library Assistant-C: Written Test and Skill/Trade Test

salary_details.details: Scientist-C: Level-10 (Rs. 56,100 – 1,77,500) as per 7th CPC; Rs. 55,000/- stipend during the one-year Scientist Trainee period Junior Engineer-C: Level-6 (Rs. 35,400 – 1,12,400) as per 7th CPC Library Assistant-C: Level-6 (Rs. 35,400 – 1,12,400) as per 7th CPC | All posts carry allowances such as DA, HRA, and Transport Allowance, besides benefits like LTC and medical reimbursement, as per IUAC Rules.

selection_process: Selection is based on performance in the Written Test and Interview/Skill Test/Trade Test
as applicable to each post. Online applications will be scrutinized by a shortlisting/screening committee
which may restrict the number of candidates called for the written test/interview/skill test based on qualifications
and relevance of experience higher than the minimum prescribed. All stages of recruitment will be held in Delhi/New Delhi only. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the written test.
how_to_apply: Visit the official IUAC recruitment portal: https://www.iuac.res.in/vacancies
Locate the online application link for Advertisement No. 06/2026
Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and category details
Upload all required documents in the prescribed format
Pay the applicable non-refundable application fee through online mode
Review all entered details carefully, as the application cannot be altered or resubmitted once submitted
Submit the application before the last date, 4 August 2026, 23:59 Hrs
Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference (hard copy is not to be sent to IUAC)
important_instructions: Candidate must be a citizen of India. Eligibility for the post applied is considered as on the last date of receipt of application. All stages of recruitment will be held in Delhi/New Delhi only. Mere fulfilment of minimum qualifications/eligibility does not entitle a candidate to be called for the written test/interview. Government/PSU/autonomous body employees must apply through proper channel with a No-Objection Certificate, vigilance clearance, and last five years' ACR/APAR at the time of document verification. Application once submitted cannot be altered or resubmitted under any circumstances. Incomplete applications or those without relevant enclosures will be rejected. All correspondence will be made through the registered email ID only; no separate letter by post will be sent. Selected candidates will undergo a medical examination and police verification prior to/after joining. Selected candidates will be required to execute a service bond to serve IUAC for at least 3 years. Number of vacancies, including reserved categories, is provisional and may change. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification of candidature. Any addendum/corrigendum will be published only on the official IUAC website, www.iuac.res.in. For technical/payment queries, contact: [email protected]

all_official_links.label: Download IUAC Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Here

content_sections.heading: IUAC Recruitment 2026: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Note: The official notification does not mention a separate application start date. Candidates are advised to check the IUAC website regularly for updates on the written test/interview schedule.

content_sections.heading: IUAC Recruitment 2026: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Total Posts: 08 Of the 5 Scientist-C vacancies, 2 are on an anticipated basis and 1 is on a lien basis. Initial appointment to Scientist-C will be as Scientist Trainee, carrying a stipend of Rs. 55,000/- during the one-year training period, after which the trainee will be absorbed in Level-10 of the Pay Matrix as Scientist-C.

content_sections.heading: IUAC Recruitment 2026: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Scientist-C: M.Sc. (Physics/Applied Physics) with a consistently good academic record (Class-X onwards with at least 60%) from a recognized University/Institute. Candidates completing their M.Sc. in academic year 2025-26 can also apply, provided the final degree is available at the time of interview. Desirable: proficiency in the use of a variety of computer applications. Junior Engineer-C: Diploma (Electronics) from a recognized university/institute with a consistently good academic record (Class-X onwards with minimum 60% marks). Desirable: 3 years' experience in the relevant field with an R&D institution, and proficiency in computer applications. The diploma/degree must be cleared on or before the last date of application submission. Library Assistant-C: B.Lib. with B.Sc. and 4 years' experience in the operation of a computerized library. Desirable: knowledge of computer applications. Scientist-C: Written Test and Interview Junior Engineer-C: Written Test and Skill/Trade Test Library Assistant-C: Written Test and Skill/Trade Test

content_sections.heading: IUAC Recruitment 2026: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Scientist-C: 26 years Junior Engineer-C: 30 years Library Assistant-C: 34 years Eligibility, including age, is considered as on the last date of receipt of application. No age relaxation is available to persons working on Contract/Ad-hoc/Daily Wage/Work Charged basis.

rows.category: Persons with Disability (PwD, min. 40% benchmark disability)

rows.age_relaxation: Length of Military Service plus 3 years

rows.category: Central/State Govt./Autonomous Body/University/Research Institute employees with 3+ years of regular service

rows.age_relaxation: Can apply up to 40 years (45 years for SC/ST)

content_sections.heading: IUAC Recruitment 2026: Salary/Pay Scale
content_sections.text: Scientist-C: Level-10 (Rs. 56,100 – 1,77,500) as per 7th CPC; Rs. 55,000/- stipend during the one-year Scientist Trainee period Junior Engineer-C: Level-6 (Rs. 35,400 – 1,12,400) as per 7th CPC Library Assistant-C: Level-6 (Rs. 35,400 – 1,12,400) as per 7th CPC All posts carry allowances such as DA, HRA, and Transport Allowance, besides benefits like LTC and medical reimbursement, as per IUAC Rules.

content_sections.heading: IUAC Recruitment 2026: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee is non-refundable and must be paid through online mode. Candidates are advised to check their eligibility before submitting the application form or fee payment.

content_sections.heading: IUAC Recruitment 2026: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection is based on performance in the Written Test and Interview/Skill Test/Trade Test, as applicable to each post. Online applications will be scrutinized by a shortlisting/screening committee, which may restrict the number of candidates called for the written test/interview/skill test based on qualifications, level, and relevance of experience higher than the minimum prescribed. All stages of recruitment will be held in Delhi/New Delhi only. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the written test.

content_sections.heading: IUAC Recruitment 2026: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Candidates must upload the following documents as proof, in support of their application: Certificates of educational qualifications in chronological order (SSC, HSC, Diploma, UG Degree, PG Degree, etc.) along with mark sheets for all years/semesters of the minimum qualification prescribed Certificate of Date of Birth (Municipality-issued or Matriculation/High School certificate) Valid category certificate (SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD/Ex-servicemen), if applicable Experience certificates in chronological order, on the organization's letterhead, with date of issue, name, designation, period of work, nature of duties, and signature/seal of the Administrative Authority Salary certificates with a clear breakup of Pay, DA, HRA, and other allowances (consolidated salary certificates from private companies will not be accepted) Certificate of proficiency for desirable qualifications, wherever required Photograph and Signature (JPEG/JPG/PNG format; photograph not more than one month old) One valid photo ID: Aadhaar-UID (preferable)/Passport/PAN Card/Voter ID/Driving License

content_sections.heading: IUAC Recruitment 2026: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Candidate must be a citizen of India. Eligibility for the post applied is considered as on the last date of receipt of application. All stages of recruitment will be held in Delhi/New Delhi only. Mere fulfilment of minimum qualifications/eligibility does not entitle a candidate to be called for the written test/interview. Government/PSU/autonomous body employees must apply through proper channel with a No-Objection Certificate, vigilance clearance, and last five years' ACR/APAR at the time of document verification. Application once submitted cannot be altered or resubmitted under any circumstances. Incomplete applications or those without relevant enclosures will be rejected. All correspondence will be made through the registered email ID only; no separate letter by post will be sent. Selected candidates will undergo a medical examination and police verification prior to/after joining. Selected candidates will be required to execute a service bond to serve IUAC for at least 3 years. Number of vacancies, including reserved categories, is provisional and may change. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification of candidature. Any addendum/corrigendum will be published only on the official IUAC website, www.iuac.res.in. For technical/payment queries, contact: [email protected]

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IUAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 4 August 2026, up to 23:59 Hrs.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IUAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 8 vacancies are available: 5 for Scientist-C, 2 for Junior Engineer-C, and 1 for Library Assistant-C.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for IUAC Scientist-C Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit for Scientist-C is 26 years, for Junior Engineer-C is 30 years, and for Library Assistant-C is 34 years, as on the last date of receipt of application, with relaxation as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary of Scientist-C at IUAC?
faq.answer: Scientist-C carries Pay Level-10 (Rs. 56,100 – 1,77,500) as per 7th CPC. During the one-year training period as Scientist Trainee, a stipend of Rs. 55,000/- is paid.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for IUAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is Rs. 1,000/- for Scientist-C and Rs. 500/- for Junior Engineer-C/Library Assistant-C. SC/ST and PWD candidates pay Rs. 500/-, and Women candidates pay Rs. 250/-, as per the notification.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for IUAC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official IUAC recruitment portal at https://www.iuac.res.in/vacancies.
